title: taraxacum agrarium
intro: Taraxacum agrarium, also known as the garden dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion genus. The plant contains medicinal properties, including bitter compounds like taraxasterol, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum agrarium include its ability to support liver function, aid in digestion, and help to reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and skin problems. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum agrarium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
